## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe clearly what the problem is.

Ex: _I'm always frustrated when [...]_

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternate Solutions

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## How This Helps Users of German Law Vault

How would this feature improve the experience for someone researching German law, preparing for a legal situation, or navigating a dispute?

## Affected Area

- [ ] **Search** — new filters, law categories, results display
- [ ] **Law detail page** — improved norm browsing or links
- [ ] **AI Guidance** — new guidance features, better paths
- [ ] **Chat** — new chat mode, model support, features
- [ ] **Bookmarks** — folder improvements, sharing, export
- [ ] **Auth** — additional auth methods
- [ ] **Translation / localization** — new language, i18n improvements
- [ ] **Document generation** — new templates, formats
- [ ] **Infrastructure** — performance, DX, security
- [ ] **Other** — specify below

## Additional Context

Add any sketches, mockups, references from other legal tools, or relevant GitHub issues here.
